name: math-primitives
description: Semantic math primitive atoms: Frac (fraction), Pow (exponent), Sub (subscript), Sqrt (radical), Abs (absolute value), Deg (degree), Inf (infinity), Greek letter components
whenToUse: Use to compose mathematical expressions inline in JSX without raw Unicode or LaTeX. Compose with Equation and Solution for full semantic math.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for complex display equations — use BlockMath with KaTeX for heavy LaTeX. These primitives are for structural, composable math.
